title: Pixar's 'Toy Story 5' lassos biggest opening weekend in franchise history with $160 million haul
summary_full: Disney and Pixar's "Toy Story 5" tallied $160 million domestically during its opening weekend, the highest debut in franchise history.
summary_public: Disney and Pixar's "Toy Story 5" tallied $160 million domestically during its opening weekend, the highest debut in franchise history.
